resources.string: Streams phone IMU samples directly to one XR receiver on your local network. No cloud, location, camera, microphone, account, analytics, or telemetry.
Experimental software — not a medical device. Passenger use only. Never operate while driving. Secure the phone screen-up with its top edge facing forward.

Enter this key manually in the receiver before Start; clipboard copy is disabled. It exists only in memory, is hidden while sending, and changes after every sender session, when regenerated, or when the app process restarts.
Stopped. No data is being sent.
Stopped. A fresh key is shown; enter it in the receiver before starting the next session.
Sending authenticated IMU packets\nPackets: %1$d Dropped: %2$d Sync replies: %3$d
Calibrating — keep the mounted phone still (%1$d/%2$d)
Stopped safely: %1$s\nA fresh key is shown; enter it in the receiver before retrying.
Pairing key regenerated. No data is being sent.
Enter a local/private numeric IP address
